## How it was tested

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` and `pytest` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change (or N/A with a reason)
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or CLI changed
- [ ] No new category-X (GPL/AGPL) dependencies
- [ ] For non-trivial changes: linked to an issue/RFC discussing the design
